overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character exploring an industrial space station interior. The character moves from a small lounge area through a corridor into a cafeteria, encountering various NPCs along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: small lounge area with seating and storage lockers

events.description: character stops approaching the seated NPC and turns to exit the room

agents.ego_description: walking toward a seated NPC on a couch, then turning to leave the room

circular metal coffee table in front of the couch
tall shelving unit with various items and equipment

metal sliding door with yellow and black warning stripes

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a small industrial lounge area toward an NPC sitting on a brown leather couch. The room features metal storage racks, wall lockers, and a round metal table. The character approaches the seated figure, then turns to exit through an industrial door.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with overhead lighting

events.description: exits the lounge through a doorway into a narrow industrial corridor
approaching a brighter area at the end of the corridor indicating the cafeteria entrance

agents.ego_description: walking down a dimly lit corridor with metal flooring and overhead fluorescent lights

entered.detail: staircase leading upward with metal railings and grated steps
long fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling
bundles of industrial cables running along the wall
yellow and black hazard markings painted on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow industrial corridor with metal walls, overhead fluorescent lighting, and yellow warning stripes on the floor. A metal staircase is visible to the left as the character walks toward a brighter area at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: cafeteria mess hall with dining tables and serving counter

events.description: enters the cafeteria area from the corridor, revealing dining tables and other people
navigates around tables while moving deeper into the cafeteria

agents.ego_description: walking into a cafeteria and moving past other people dining and standing near the counter

notable_agents.action: standing near the serving counter wearing a distinctive yellow jacket
walking away from the camera toward the back of the cafeteria

entered.detail: long rectangular dining tables with attached white benches
food service counter with steam trays and serving equipment
round yellow seating stools positioned near tables
elevated walkway with railings overlooking the cafeteria floor
stainless steel appliances and storage units in the background

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious cafeteria with multiple dining tables, yellow stools, and a serving counter on the left. Several NPCs are present, including one in a yellow jacket near the counter and another walking away. An upper catwalk overlooks the area as the character moves through the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped industrial lounge through a narrow corridor and into a wide, bustling cafeteria. It begins by following the character past metal storage racks and a round table toward an NPC on a brown leather couch, before turning to exit through a heavy industrial door. As the character moves forward, the environment tightens into a narrow hallway defined by metal walls, overhead fluorescent lighting, and yellow warning stripes on the floor. The scene then opens up as the character leaves the corridor behind, transitioning into a spacious dining area filled with yellow stools and serving counters. Finally, the camera glides through the cafeteria past various NPCs and beneath an overlooking catwalk, completing the journey from a private quarters to a public hub.
